title: First-Line Supervisors of Landscaping, Lawn Service, and Groundskeeping Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of workers engaged in landscaping or groundskeeping activities. Work may involve reviewing contracts to ascertain service, machine, and workforce requirements; answering inquiries from potential customers regarding methods, material, and price ranges; and preparing estimates according to labor, material, and machine costs.

tasks.text: Establish and enforce operating procedures and work standards that will ensure adequate performance and personnel safety.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule work for crews, depending on work priorities, crew or equipment availability, or weather conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tour grounds, such as parks, botanical gardens, cemeteries, or golf courses, to inspect conditions of plants and soil.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor project activities to ensure that instructions are followed, deadlines are met, and schedules are maintained.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct activities of workers who perform duties, such as landscaping, cultivating lawns, or pruning trees and shrubs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect completed work to ensure conformance to specifications, standards, and contract requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plant or maintain vegetation through activities such as mulching, fertilizing, watering, mowing, or pruning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or perform mixing or application of fertilizers, insecticides, herbicides, or fungicides.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train workers in tasks such as transplanting or pruning trees or shrubs, finishing cement, using equipment, or caring for turf.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare service estimates based on labor, material, and machine costs and maintain budgets for individual projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify diseases or pests affecting landscaping and order appropriate treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inventory supplies of tools, equipment, or materials to ensure that sufficient supplies are available and items are in usable condition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain required records, such as personnel information or project records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Perform personnel-related activities, such as hiring workers, evaluating staff performance, or taking disciplinary actions when performance problems occur.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide workers with assistance in performing duties as necessary to meet deadlines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or maintain required records, such as work activity or personnel reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Investigate work-related complaints to verify problems and to determine responses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as authorizing leaves or processing time sheets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other supervisors to coordinate work activities with those of other departments or units.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or assist workers engaged in the maintenance or repair of equipment, such as power tools or motorized equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review contracts or work assignments to determine service, machine, or workforce requirements for jobs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Order the performance of corrective work when problems occur and recommend procedural changes to avoid such problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with managers or landscape architects to develop plans or schedules for landscaping maintenance or improvement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend changes in working conditions or equipment used to increase crew efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Answer inquiries from current or prospective customers regarding methods, materials, or price ranges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install or maintain landscaped areas, performing tasks such as removing snow, pouring cement curbs, or repairing sidewalks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or supervise the installation of sprinkler systems, calculating water pressure, or valve and pipe coverage needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate with customers regarding fees for landscaping, lawn service, or groundskeeping work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
